commands.review_summary:
The PR adds four regex-based skill-scanner rules for network listeners, prototype-pollution patterns, symlink operations, and credential-file reads, with positive and negative scanSource tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-review defects: source inspection of the proposed regexes plus current `scanSource` context mechanics shows the false-positive and false-negative paths. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Security-sensitive external PR needs contributor proof, conflict resolution, and maintainer scanner-policy review before code repair or merge.
